name: Chicken Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add oil and swirl to coat the pan.
3. Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
4. Place the chicken in the hot skillet and cook for 6-8 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
5. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
6. In a separate bowl, whisk together all teriyaki sauce ingredients: soy sauce, honey, cornstarch, garlic powder, ginger powder, and red pepper flakes.
7. Return the chicken to the skillet and pour the sauce over it.
8. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
9. Serve hot with steamed rice.
